hero.headline: Long Island's Trusted Pool & Spa Experts
hero.subheadline: For 36 years, the Lucia family has helped over 25,000 homeowners transform their backyards into personal wellness retreats. From hot tubs and swim spas to full pool service, we handle every detail so you just relax.
checkmarks: Largest service dept on Long Island

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Hot Tubs, Swim Spas, Pools &<br class="hidden md:block"> Everything In Between
services.subtitle: Whether you want to soak away stress, swim laps at home, or keep your pool pristine all season, the Suntek team has you covered from consultation to installation and beyond.

cards.title: Hot Tub Sales & Installation
cards.description: Explore 15+ premium hot tubs on display from Getaway, LH, Clarity, and Twilight Spas. Expert consultation, delivery, and professional installation included.

cards.title: Swim Spa Sales & Installation
cards.description: H2X Fitness and Michael Phelps Signature Swim Spas for year-round fitness and relaxation. Complete sales, delivery, and setup by our certified team.

cards.title: Sauna & Cold Tub Sales
cards.description: SunWave and Sweaty Goat saunas plus Chilly Goat Cold Tubs for the ultimate home wellness circuit. Professional guidance from selection to installation.

cards.title: Pool Service & Maintenance
cards.description: Seasonal openings, closings, water management, quarterly water changes, and routine maintenance for in-ground, above-ground, and semi-inground pools.

cards.title: Safety Covers & Equipment
cards.description: Custom-fitted pool safety covers from Loop-Loc, Meyco, and Covana. Plus heat pumps, salt systems, robotic cleaners, and all the accessories you need.

cards.title: Emergency Spa Repair
cards.description: Long Island's largest service team provides fast emergency repair for hot tubs and spas. We minimize downtime so you get back to relaxing sooner.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Backyard Oasis

steps.title: Visit Our Farmingdale Showroom
steps.description: Come experience 15+ hot tubs, swim spas, saunas, and cold tubs in person. Our team will help you find the perfect fit for your space, goals, and budget.

steps.title: We Handle Delivery & Installation
steps.description: Our licensed, insured crew manages every detail from site prep to professional installation. We treat your home with the same care we would our own.

steps.title: Relax & Enjoy for Years to Come
steps.description: With Long Island's largest service department behind you, ongoing maintenance, water care, and repairs are always just a phone call away.

about.label: Why Long Islanders Choose Suntek
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1989 — Three Generations of Trust
about.description: Led by President Robert Lucia alongside Nicholas and Dylan Lucia, Suntek Pools & Spas is a true family business that has served Long Island for over 36 years. With 25,000+ happy customers from Montauk to Manhattan and the largest service department in Nassau and Suffolk County, we have earned our reputation through honest advice, quality products, and service that goes above and beyond. We proudly support St. Jude, the Lupus Foundation, and the Michael Phelps Foundation.

features.title: Fully Licensed & Insured
features.description: Licensed across all Long Island counties with full insurance coverage. Every installation meets or exceeds local codes and safety standards.

features.title: 100% U.S.A. Made Products
features.description: We stand behind American craftsmanship. Every hot tub, swim spa, and sauna we sell is manufactured right here in the United States.

features.title: Largest Service Team on Long Island
features.description: With the biggest service department in Nassau and Suffolk County, we respond faster and resolve issues the first time. Your investment is always protected.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every quote includes delivery, installation, and a full walkthrough. No hidden fees, no upsells — just honest pricing from a family you can trust.

guarantee.headline: Our "Wellness Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with your purchase or any service visit, call us and we will make it right — no questions asked. We have built our reputation over 36 years by standing behind every product and every promise. Your satisfaction is not just a policy, it is the Lucia family standard.

faqs.question: Can I try a hot tub before I buy?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Our Farmingdale showroom has 15+ hot tubs on display, and we encourage you to come in and experience them firsthand. Our team will walk you through features, sizing, and pricing with zero pressure.

faqs.question: How long does installation typically take?
faqs.answer: Most hot tub and swim spa installations are completed within 1-2 weeks of purchase, depending on site preparation needs. Our licensed crew handles everything from delivery to final setup so you can start enjoying your investment quickly.

faqs.question: Do you service pools as well as spas?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer comprehensive pool service including seasonal openings and closings, water management, quarterly water changes, and routine maintenance for in-ground, above-ground, and semi-inground pools across Long Island.

faqs.question: What brands do you carry?
faqs.answer: We are an award-winning Master Spas dealer, carrying Getaway Spas, LH Spas, Clarity Spas, Twilight Spas, H2X Fitness Swim Spas, Michael Phelps Signature Swim Spas, SunWave and Sweaty Goat saunas, and Chilly Goat Cold Tubs — all 100% U.S.A. made.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency repair services?
faqs.answer: Yes. We operate the largest service department in Nassau and Suffolk County, which means faster response times for emergency spa and hot tub repairs. Call us and our team will get your unit back up and running as quickly as possible.

testimonials.name: Doris B.
testimonials.text: Their sales team, techs and workers are fantastic to work with. Had my hot tub running perfectly. The whole experience from the showroom visit to installation was smooth and professional.

testimonials.name: Will C.
testimonials.text: Delivery and installation was flawless. The tub itself is everything we hoped for. The Suntek team made the entire process easy and stress-free from start to finish.

testimonials.name: Robert K.
testimonials.text: Drew was very helpful during the whole process from beginning to installation. The team was professional, on time, and made sure everything was set up perfectly. Highly recommend Suntek.
